top_signals.title: Scorching Summer Pushes India’s Power Demand to Record Again
top_signals.summary: India’s peak electricity demand climbed to a record for the second consecutive day as blistering heat pushed up use of cooling appliances such as air-conditioners.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Echodyne and Moog Successfully Demonstrate Reconfigurable Integrated-weapon Platform (RIwP®) at U.S. Army Exercise
top_signals.summary: Demonstration showed how combining advanced radar, sophisticated control systems, and AI can turn existing kinetic weapons into highly effective C-UAS effectors
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Pump.fun accounts for over one-third of Solana’s Q1 revenue despite memecoin slowdown
top_signals.summary: Pump.fun pulled in $124.7 million in Q1 2026, making it Solana’s largest revenue generator even as memecoin activity cooled, while the network’s RWA market cap crossed $2 billion.
